message:
fix(gui): fix same_hyperlink to return true for (None, None) and add render unit tests

same_hyperlink previously returned false for (None, None) due to the
catch-all arm, causing unnecessary redraws when adjacent cells both
lack hyperlinks. Add explicit (None, None) => true arm.

Add test module with tests for: resolve_fg_color_attr (style foreground
vs palette, bold intensity), same_hyperlink (both None, matching Arc,
different URLs, one None), and update_next_frame_time (empty, earlier
override, later no-override).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
